<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get account connector authorization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/accounts/{account_id}/oauth2/connectors/{connector_id}/authorization"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get the OAuth2 authorization status for a Data Source connector on an account.
